title: Garden Samwise diary and squad retrospectives
goal: Use Rosie to mine diary and retrospective artifacts for evidence-backed recommendations that improve the next iteration cycle.

steps.text: Identify recurring wins, recurring misses, and repeated blockers with objective evidence references.
Publish a recommendations report in `Docs/PersonaKit/Development/retrospectives/worktree-squad/recommendations/` with prioritized action items.
Append one `recommendation` entry to `worktree-squad-retrospectives.jsonl` with owner and checkpoint fields.
Pause for AJ review before applying non-trivial pack/session or process changes from recommendations.
Apply approved changes, then run gardening and squad-log validators.

acceptanceCriteria: Recommendation report includes recurring wins, misses, open questions, and prioritized actions
Recommendation entry is appended to retrospective JSONL stream with contract fields
Every recommendation is linked to evidence from diary or retrospective artifacts
No non-trivial process/pack update is applied without AJ review

verification.text: Confirm recommendation report exists and references input artifacts
